contract.prdJustification: Open monitor page | target: /monitor | assert: Affected stablecoin card shows Rapid Mover pill
GET /api/dashboard/trend?range=24h|7d|30d returns multi-coin series and risk bands for FR-MD03
Inspect alerts feed | target: Latest rapid mover entry | assert: Entry shows stablecoin, variable, delta, severity, and timestamp
GET /api/stablecoins/:symbol returns the full detail payload including score composition, drivers, review state, and freshness for FR-SD01–08
GET /api/stablecoins/:symbol returns the full detail payload including score composition, drivers, review state, and freshness for FR-SD01–08
GET /api/stablecoins/:symbol/variables returns all 9 variables with raw values, normalized scores, source metadata, and rule summaries for FR-SD06 and AC-04
Open alert details | target: Alert Feed Item Link | assert: Browser navigates to /stablecoins/:symbol with related alert context visible

contract.prdJustification: BASELINE — implicit infrastructure for any authenticated backend (login/refresh/logout/me). Not enumerated in PRD prose but required for every user flow that hits a bearer-guarded route.
